---
title: "Welcome to the Test Course"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
canvas:
  type: page
  published: true
---

![Test image](../graphics/test_image.png)

This is a **test page** used by the E2E test suite.

## Inline Math

The equation $E = mc^2$ is inline. Here is a fraction: $\frac{1}{2}$.

## Display Math

$$
\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}
$$

## Cross-Links

Link to the assignment: [Test Assignment](../02_Basics/01_Assignment.qmd).

Link to the quiz page: [Classic Quiz](05_Classic_Quiz.qmd).

## External Link

Visit [Python Docs](https://docs.python.org/3/).

## Lists

- Item A
- Item B
- Item C

## Table

| Name | Value |
|:-----|------:|
| Alpha | 1 |
| Beta | 2 |
| Gamma | 3 |
